scripts.build:binary: bun run build:assets && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/ysa-agent-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/ysa-agent-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/ysa-agent-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/ysa-agent-linux-x64 && bun run restore:assets
